Patch Set 2:

(3 comments)

I think that there is a disconnect between the request in LU-12872 and what is being implemented here.  Shuichi can please clarify, but I think LU-12872 was asking for added stats on the bulk read/write sizes, not the size of the RPC itself (which does not contain the data).

I'm adding comments to Lu-12872 to hopefully clarify this.

commit.subject: LU-12872 lprocfs: add rpc number and size to job stats
commit.message:
LU-12872 lprocfs: add rpc number and size to job stats

Add rpc number and size to job stats for mdt and obdfilter.

Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3f28b2cc8c6887f3fc9d7cc195ab3c990fde4fa9
